title: Matthew 3:16-17
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: After the Lord was baptized, the heavens were opened, and the spirit descended upon him like a dove, and the voice of the Father thundered: This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased.

title: Psalm 29
author: Francesca LaRosa
snippet: The Lord will bless his people with peace.

title: Matthew 2:2
author: Josh Blakesley
snippet: The heavens were opened and the voice of the Father thundered: "This is my beloved Son, Listen to him!"

title: Flow River Flow
author: Bob Hurd
snippet: Flow river flow, flow over me. O living water, poured out for free; O living water, flow over me.

title: John 1:32,34
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: Behold the One of whom John said: I have seen and testified that this is the Son of God.

title: Spirit and Grace
author: Ricky Manalo, CSP
snippet: Spirit and grace, here in this meal; you are the wind that breathes through the field. Gather the wheat and form us in Christ. Come, be our source and breath of life.

title: Holy Spirit, Come to Me
author: Julie Hoy.
snippet: Holy Spirit, come to me; Open my eyes to you. Holy Spirit, come to me; Open my eyes to you.

title: Spirit of Peace
author: SUNO AI x Jim Ngo
snippet: Holy Spirit, gentle dove, Come and fill our hearts, with love. As we go, your peace we claim, Baptized, in the Saviors name.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
